app.title: LyVoX
app.description: Marketplace for goods, services and real estate

infocards.verified_body: Phone and email verification make risky listings easier to spot.
infocards.payment_body: Billing is set up to support Belgian checkout methods through provider settings.
infocards.report_body: Keep payment and shipping conversations inside LyVoX whenever possible.

footer.tagline: Belgium-focused marketplace for local listings, verified seller signals and safer conversations.

common.page_not_found_body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or was moved.

search.verifiedOnlyHelper: Show listings only from sellers with verified email and phone
search.emptyBrowse: Browse categories or try a different search term to find what you need.
search.emptyWithFilters: Try removing some filters or broadening your price range.
search.zeroResultSaveTitle: Get notified when new matches appear
search.relaxedTitle: No exact matches — here's what's similar
search.relaxedCount: We broadened your filters and found {count} more.
search.relaxedHint: We broadened your filters to show related listings.

contact.safer_1: Keep payment and delivery discussion inside LyVoX.
contact.safer_2: Inspect the item and seller signals before sending money.
contact.too_many: Too many chat attempts. Try again shortly.
contact.safety_tip: A quick safety check confirms you're a real account, then opens a private chat. LyVoX never handles payment.

home.hero_title: Find local deals with stronger trust signals.
home.hero_subtitle: Search Belgian listings, compare sellers, and keep risky conversations inside the platform.
home.stat_verified: seller profiles verified in latest results

sell.meta_title: Post a free classified ad in Belgium | LyVoX
sell.meta_description: Sell locally in Belgium: post a free listing in minutes, add photos, and chat with buyers inside LyVoX.
sell.title: Sell your stuff locally — free
sell.subtitle: Post a listing in minutes. Buyers nearby see it right away, and every conversation stays inside LyVoX.
sell.step1_body: Snap a few clear pictures — listings with photos get contacted far more often.
sell.step2_body: Title, price, category and a couple of honest sentences about the condition.
sell.step3_body: Buyers message you inside LyVoX — agree on the handover together.
sell.faq_a1: Posting a regular listing is free. Optional paid boosts raise visibility and are always labelled as promoted.
sell.faq_q2: Do I need a business account?
sell.faq_a2: No — private sellers just confirm email and phone. Businesses are verified with KBO/VAT and get a public trader profile.
sell.faq_a3: Through LyVoX chat. Your phone number and email stay private.

post.share_banner_body: Share the link — buyers will find it sooner.
post.fast_completion_body: Add a few category details so buyers can compare it faster.
post.login_to_post: Please sign in to post an advert
post.create_failed: Failed to create draft. Try again.
post.title: Title
post.create_draft_hint: Create a draft first (or open the page with ?edit=<id>)

form.no_specialized_fields: No specialized fields for this category
form.skip_to_next: You can skip to the next step
form.no_vehicle_fields: This step is only for vehicles

form.skip_to_description: Click Next to proceed to description
form.save_draft_first: Please save a draft first to upload photos
form.final_photos_hint: At least 1 photo is required to publish your advert. You can drag and drop images here or click to select.
form.description_min: Description must be at least 10 characters long
form.media_required: At least 1 photo is required to publish your advert
form.description_short_hint: Aim for 120+ characters for better search visibility ({n} more)
form.verify_to_publish_body: Your draft is saved. Verify your phone number once and you're ready to publish.

post.not_found_or_not_owner: Listing not found or you do not have access
post.signin_intro: Sign in before creating a listing so drafts, buyer messages, and verification stay attached to one account.
post.verify_body: Listings require confirmed contact details to reduce fraud and keep buyer conversations accountable.

profile.delete_advert_description: This action cannot be undone. The advert will be permanently deleted.
profile.no_adverts_found: You don't have any adverts yet
profile.load_error_hint: Could not load your profile data. Refresh the page or sign in again.
profile.security_description: Manage biometrics, active sessions, and two-factor authentication.
profile.profile_description: Update personal information and public display settings.
profile.notifications_coming_soon: Full notification preferences will be available soon.
profile.notif_email_desc: Choose which emails you receive from LyVoX.
profile.no_reviews: No reviews for this user yet.
profile.edit_intro: Keep your seller profile clear and consistent. Buyers use these details before starting a conversation.
profile.edit_save_error: Could not save your profile. Check the values and try again.
profile.display_name_hint: Shown on your listings, profile, and chat conversations.
profile.email_hint: Email changes are handled through account security.
profile.phone_hint: Used for trust checks and buyer contact preferences. Verify it from the verification page.
profile.account_security_intro: Manage two-factor authentication, active sessions, and recovery-aware account protection.
profile.active_sessions_desc: Review where your LyVoX account is currently signed in.
profile.no_active_session_desc: Sign in again if this page cannot read your current session.
profile.unrecognized_device_title: See a device you do not recognize?
profile.unrecognized_device_desc: End the session, change your password, and keep two-factor authentication enabled before continuing buyer or seller conversations.
profile.rec_totp_desc: They protect listing drafts, seller identity signals, and buyer conversations from password-only account takeover.
profile.rec_sessions_desc: If you use shared or public devices, sign out when you finish and check this page afterwards.
profile.rec_recovery_desc: Verified email and phone details make account recovery safer without exposing private information to buyers.
profile.disconnect_all_desc: This signs out all other active sessions. Those devices will need to sign in again before accessing your account.
profile.passkeys_unavailable_title: Passkeys are not available for this account yet
profile.passkeys_unavailable_desc: LyVoX currently uses authenticator-app codes for MFA. Passkeys and WebAuthn will be added only when the provider path is stable enough for account recovery.
profile.protection_totp: TOTP authenticator apps such as Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy, or Microsoft Authenticator.
profile.protection_signals: Verified email and phone signals used across seller trust surfaces.
profile.totp_rec_title: Use an authenticator app for stronger account protection
profile.totp_rec_desc: Time-based one-time passwords are a reliable two-factor method used by major account systems. They protect your LyVoX account even if a password is exposed.
profile.totp_step_scan: Scan the QR code from LyVoX.
profile.totp_step_code: Enter the six-digit code to finish setup.

chat.title: Messages

empty.title: No conversations yet
empty.description: Start a conversation by contacting a seller from an advert page.

chat.no_messages_body: Ask a specific question about condition, pickup, documents, or payment before arranging a deal.
chat.realtime_warning: Live updates are reconnecting. You can still send messages.

safety.body: Keep payment links, delivery changes, and identity questions in this chat so support can review the timeline if needed.
safety.tip_one: Avoid external payment links and rushed deposits.
safety.tip_three: Report suspicious requests from the listing page or support.
safety.tip_two: Inspect high-value items before sending money.
safety.title: Deal safely

chat.safety_check_pill: Safety check passed · chat opened securely
chat.subtitle: Keep seller questions, payment decisions, and delivery details inside LyVoX.

auth.heroHeading: Sign in to manage listings, messages, and trusted payments.
auth.heroSubtitle: Use password, magic link, or OAuth. We keep account actions clear and route you back to the exact marketplace task you started.
auth.cardDescription: Choose the fastest option available for your account.
auth.rememberDevice: Remember this device for 30 days after the email link sign-in.
auth.errorIncorrectCredentials: The email or password is incorrect.

category.indexSubtitle: Choose a section to browse listings and subcategories.
category.listingsSubtitle: Active listings in this category are refreshed as sellers publish new offers.
category.seoDescription: Browse {category} listings on LyVoX — Belgium's trust-first marketplace. New offers from verified sellers, refreshed daily.
category.noListings: There are no active listings in this category yet. Be the first to post one.

report.title: Report listing
report.too_many_attempts: Too many attempts. Try again in {seconds}s.

contactpage.title: Contact LyVoX support
contactpage.lead: Choose the route that matches your issue. For listing, payment, or safety reports, include the advert link, seller profile, screenshots, and the timeline of what happened.
contactpage.priorityBody: Safety, account access, and transaction issues are reviewed first. Routine product questions are handled after urgent trust and security reports.
contactpage.accountDesc: Help with sign in, recovery, profile verification, or suspicious account activity.
contactpage.listingDesc: Report a suspicious advert, payment concern, or safety issue before continuing a deal.
contactpage.generalDesc: Questions about LyVoX, marketplace policies, partnerships, or operational support.
contactpage.beforeTip1: Do not share passwords, card details, or one-time codes in messages.
contactpage.beforeTip2: Use the report button on suspicious adverts so moderation receives the listing context.
contactpage.beforeTip3: Keep communication inside LyVoX chat whenever possible for a clearer dispute trail.

verify.title: Account verification
verify.subtitle: Verify email and phone details to improve marketplace trust and unlock safer publishing flows.
verify.ready_desc: Your account has the required trust checks.
verify.required_desc: Complete both checks before posting with full trust signals.
verify.email_done: Your email is verified. Marketplace updates and buyer/seller notifications can reach this address.
verify.phone_done: Your phone is verified. Buyers can use stronger trust signals when deciding to contact you.
verify.help_email_a: Check spam or request another confirmation email.
verify.email_intro: We sent a verification email to
verify.email_intro_2: Check your inbox and open the confirmation link.
verify.email_send_error_retry: Could not send the email. Try again later.
verify.phone_update_error: Could not update your phone number.
verify.code_send_error: Could not send the verification code.
verify.code_incorrect: The code is incorrect. Try again.

trust.login_failed: Sign in failed. Check your email and password.
trust.phone_already_registered: This phone number is already linked to another account.

trust.phone_line_type_blocked: Virtual or disposable numbers aren't accepted. Use a real Belgian mobile number.
trust.gate_body_auth: Create a free account or sign in to continue.
trust.gate_body_phone: Confirm your phone number to contact sellers and publish listings.

seller_gate.title: Verify to see the seller
seller_gate.body: Confirm your phone number to view the seller's profile and contact them. It keeps the marketplace safe for everyone.

pro.title: Become a professional seller
pro.signin_required: Sign in to register your business and start selling professionally on LyVoX.
pro.verify_body: A verified phone number is required to register as a professional seller. This keeps our marketplace trustworthy for all buyers.

intro.heading: Company identity
intro.body: Register your company on LyVoX to unlock professional seller features, a verified business badge, and full compliance with Belgian consumer law.
intro.requires_phone: A verified phone number is required to become a professional seller.

reg.kbo_invalid: Invalid KBO number (10 digits, MOD-97 check)

terms.heading: Consumer law terms
terms.withdrawal_help: Belgian consumer law (CEL VI.45/VI.83) requires you to offer a 14-day right of withdrawal to consumers. Describe your withdrawal and return policy.
terms.withdrawal_placeholder: Consumers have the right to withdraw from a purchase within 14 days without giving a reason...

certify.label: I confirm that the information provided is accurate and complete. I am an authorised representative of this business and I accept responsibility for compliance with Belgian consumer law obligations.

review.heading: Review and confirm
review.body: Please review your information before submitting.

submit.success: Your business account has been created!
submit.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
submit.duplicate: This company is already registered on LyVoX.
submit.verify_phone: Please verify your phone number first.

status.pending: Your VAT number is being verified with VIES. You can publish listings while verification is in progress.
status.admin_review: An admin will review and confirm your business registration shortly.
status.active_note: Your business is now active. The verified badge will appear once verification is complete.

done.verified: Your business is verified — the Verified Business badge is now active on your listings.
done.failed: We couldn't verify your VAT number automatically — our team will review it and update your badge shortly.
done.pending: Verification in progress — your VAT number is being checked with VIES. Your listings are active in the meantime.
done.na: An admin will confirm your registration (no VAT number). Your listings are active in the meantime.

cabinet.page_subtitle: Manage your shopfront, team and verification

cookie.banner_body: We use cookies to improve your experience. You can accept, reject, or customise your preferences.
cookie.necessary_desc: Authentication, security, and this consent record.
cookie.functional_desc: Recently viewed, taste preferences, saved searches, seen adverts.
cookie.analytics_desc: Aggregate usage statistics (no analytics lib active yet).
cookie.policy_intro: This page lists all cookies and browser storage items used by LyVoX, grouped by category. Necessary items are always active; others require your consent.
cookie.policy_draft_note: This policy is a working draft. Full legal text will be added before public launch.
cookie.session_personalization_body: When functional cookies are accepted, LyVoX can use category clicks and opened listings from this browser session to reorder later feed pages. The first page stays in its original order, the signals stay in sessionStorage, and they are not sent to LyVoX.

legal.draft_notice: ⚠ Draft — this content is pending final legal review and is not yet legally binding.
legal.privacy_intro: This policy explains how LyVoX processes personal data in accordance with GDPR.
legal.terms_intro: These terms govern your use of LyVoX. They are a working draft pending final legal review.
legal.imprint_dsa_contact: DSA Art.11 Single Point of Contact

delete.explain: Permanently deletes your account, listings, photos and profile. Chat messages you sent are replaced with “[deleted]” so the other person keeps their thread. Some records are kept as required by law.
delete.retained_note: Kept under legal retention: billing and invoice records (~7 years, anonymised); ID-verification records subject to a legal hold; no other personal data is retained.
delete.success: Your account has been permanently deleted.
delete.active_business: Transfer or close your business before deleting your account.
delete.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
delete.download_data_desc: Download a copy of your consent and data record before you leave.

reviews.comment_placeholder: Share your experience with this seller...
reviews.must_contact: You can review this seller after contacting them about this listing.
reviews.self: You cannot review your own listing.
reviews.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
